description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 8, 2024 at 8:39 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a food truck on 26th Street near Valencia Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling west on 26th Street when it came to a stop to yield to an oncoming food truck in a narrow roadway with 
parked vehicles on both sides of the street. As the food truck was passing the stopped Waymo AV, the front driver’s side of the food truck 
made contact with the front driver’s side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode, and a test driver was present (in the driver’s seating position). The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
